title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness meditation and bimanual coordination control: study of acute effects

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Mindfulness, meditation, and, bimanual, coordination.

**Mindfulness meditation and bimanual coordination control: study of acute effects and the mediating role of cognition.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 37255524. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2023.1162390. Mindfulness meditation (MM) involves and benefits cognitive functioning, especially attention and inhibition processes, which are also implicated in the control of complex motor skills, such as bimanual coordination. Thus, MM practice could potentially enhance bimanual coordination control through its cognitive benefits.
